title: A Genius With Amnesia - Victor Savkin, Nx
summary: Victor Savkin argues that current coding agents lack context persistence and codebase visibility, limiting their utility despite technical capability. He frames this as a critical gap that needs solving and introduces Nx and Polygraph as solutions for enabling agent autonomy in monorepos.
writeup: Victor Savkin of Nx argues that today's coding agents are capable but constrained by two gaps: they lack persistent context across sessions and they cannot see the broader codebase. The talk frames this as the central problem limiting agent usefulness, then presents Nx and Polygraph as tools for giving agents the visibility and context persistence needed to operate autonomously in monorepos. The takeaway: technical capability alone is not enough, and agent autonomy depends on solving context management and codebase awareness at the repository level.
